title: Add query-to-title alignment scoring to weekly SEO review
summary: Records release evidence for the weekly SEO priority report update that now scores how well a page's current title and meta description reflect its top query before classifying refresh priority.
completed_todo_items: Refresh underperforming pages with stronger titles, FAQs, comparison tables, and clearer search intent alignment.

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the weekly SEO report now escalates high-impression pages when the dominant query is weakly reflected in the current title.

ops.rollback_plan: Remove the query-to-title alignment scoring and revert the updated tracker fixture and report test if the weekly SEO report should return to metric-only prioritization.
